description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Windows MSVC x64 that runs on push to the master branch and on pull request open and synchronize events. Use a single windows-latest job with concurrency control that checks out the repository, sets up ccache, installs the latest CMake, restores or sets up vcpkg, fetches test data, configures and builds with CMake using presets, and uploads the resulting devilutionx.exe artifact if not in an Actions environment.
